<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/webhook/{webhookId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Remove a webhook by its ID.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}

>
</Heading>
